title: Explore New Illustrator Features | Adobe
metaDescription: Learn all about the tools and techniques you can use to create crisp, scalable graphics in Adobe Illustrator.

og.title: Explore New Illustrator Features | Adobe
og.description: Learn all about the tools and techniques you can use to create crisp, scalable graphics in Adobe Illustrator.

headings.text: We’re always working to enhance Illustrator so you can create with precision and control.
See your art from every angle, instantly.
More flexible ways to fill shapes.
Create precise lines and shapes that you can combine to make gorgeous graphics.
Generate color with simple text prompts.
Select, move, rotate, scale, and transform your artwork.
Make precise line and shape edits.
Select one element of a design.
Add and edit text in your designs.
Bend text along a line or shape.
Focus on one area of your artwork or view the entire canvas.
Add dimension and color to create designs that leap off the screen.
Make small or dramatic changes to a line or a shape.
Add dimensions to designs in a few clicks.
View design elements at new angles.
Cut up shapes to make something new.
What can you create in Illustrator?
Find that hard-to-find font with Retype.
Create next-level designs in Illustrator using generative AI.
Vectorize an image in Adobe Illustrator.
Generate and edit professional-level icons instantly.
Add sizing in a snap with the Dimension tool.
Meet the complete logo design tool.
Develop your new favorite font design.
Create banner designs that stand out on the screen.
Turn ideas into illustrations with Text to Vector Graphic.
Creative Cloud Pro for students and teachers

Adobe Creative Cloud

Adobe Illustrator

Features

Illustrator

Explore new Adobe Illustrator features.

Learn all about the tools and techniques you can use to create crisp, scalable graphics in Illustrator.

Update Illustrator

What's new
Draw
Select
Text
Navigate
Texture
Modify
We’re always working to enhance Illustrator so you can create with precision and control.
See your art from every angle, instantly.

Bring new perspectives to your work with Turntable in Illustrator. Skip hours of redraws, refine designs, and add motion for presentations or social.

More flexible ways to fill shapes.

Explore different design possibilities with powerful AI models like GPT‑4o, Gemini 2.5, and more — now in Generative Shape Fill.

Expand your artwork seamlessly.

Maximize your productivity with new Generative Expand. Resize graphics, add bleeds, and explore concepts for professional designs.

Fine-tune every shade.

Supercharge your workflow with a smoother Gradient tool and presets for more precise color transitions. A new Color Picker icon makes finding the perfect color easier than ever.

Design with more precision.

Snap to a tangent or curved shape with smarter snapping tools. Limit snapping to your active artboard for more control, without the distractions.

Effortlessly manage your fonts.

Find the fonts you need faster with an enhanced Font Browser. Apply specific filters, organize into libraries that sync across your Adobe apps, and browse all your fonts in one place.

Explore the Illustrator User Guide
What can you create in Illustrator?

Find out how to use the tools and features in real-world design projects like logos, banners, icons, and more — then try them for yourself.
